steps.title: Identify what the student must accomplish
steps.content: The student's goal is to compare the sizes of the two mountains. The notes provide the specific measurements: 1,360 mi² for Peloncillo-Pan Duro and 63 mi² for Sierrita.

steps.title: Find the choice that directly compares these sizes
steps.content:
B does this—it states which mountain is larger and includes both exact measurements.

  • A discusses the number of sky islands
  • C makes a vague claim about size variation without comparing these two mountains specifically
  • D focuses on environmental features
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
